title: Minecraft Silver
description:
Vanilla+ Endless Nomadic Adventures!
Stay on the move! Bring your base with you!
body:
![Cover Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf580eb4cfdfb33de3963a1e5b7b40c4c65788c5.png)

Minecraft Silver aims to stay true to vanilla Minecraft, yet enhancing every aspect of the original experience. Drawing inspiration from nomadic survivals like Last Oasis and World's Adrift, bringing items that allow you to keep on the move! It also leans on the idea of a sequel to minecraft, or minecraft "2", enhancing rather than changing any of what makes vanilla great. While Keeping it nostalgic, you'll find a vast world brimming with new adventures and areas, where you'll see while gliding through the skies, swing with a grappling hook, or engineer your own flying machines for boundless exploration. Craft mobile bases to journey wherever your heart desires. With a fusion of vanilla-style gameplay and innovative features, Soar Through Minecraft's Silver skies!.


Main mods:

Transport and Storage  
- Carts
- Backpacks
- Gliders
- Grappling Hook
- Ships
- Create Trains
- Immersive Aircraft
- Valkyrien Skies
- Eureka+Create


  With Valkyrien Skies, Build whatever you want with Blocks!
  Boats, Submarines, Airships, anything!

  Loads of extra content like dungeons, villages, ruins and secrets have been added every corner of of the the worlds
 
- Seas
- Lands
- Skies
- The Nether
- Lava Seas
- Deep Dark
- Deeper Dark
- The End

  
These have all received tons of extra content to procedurally generate an unique journey!

- Terralith 
- Tectonic
- River Redux
- Distant Horizons

Will forge incredible landscapes to wow at and explore!
